daily_plan_req: 1. wake up and complete morning routine at 7:00 am. 2. have breakfast at home. 3. head to the school at 8:00 am. 4. lunch break at 12:00 pm. 5. return to work until 5:00 pm. 6. head home and have dinner at 6:30 pm. 7. relax at home from 7:30 pm
